claim: Ollama supports OpenAI-compatible function calling in exact same format, enabling drop-in replacement of OpenAI models in Swarm by overriding base_url
actionable: Configure Ollama client with OpenAI library using base_url='http://localhost:11434' to run Swarm agent systems with local models
source_title: Ollama + OpenAI's Swarm - EASILY Run AI Agents Locally

claim: Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B can generate complex SQL queries with joins across tables when used in specialized agent roles within multi-agent systems
actionable: Use Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B for SQL generation and coding-heavy agentic tasks despite smaller size compared to larger models
source_title: Ollama + OpenAI's Swarm - EASILY Run AI Agents Locally

claim: Multi-agent specialization with different models per agent (router on 3B, coding agents on 7B) provides performance benefits while reducing total compute cost
actionable: Assign lightweight router agents to smaller models (3B parameters) and specialized task agents to medium models (7B) for efficiency
source_title: Ollama + OpenAI's Swarm - EASILY Run AI Agents Locally

claim: Function calling in agentic systems consumes significant tokens with OpenAI models; local Ollama eliminates per-token costs, making complex agent workflows financially viable
actionable: Migrate function-calling-heavy agent systems from cloud APIs to local Ollama deployment to reduce operational costs
source_title: Ollama + OpenAI's Swarm - EASILY Run AI Agents Locally

claim: Ollama models with tool calling support can be filtered by 'tools' tag on Ollama library search to identify compatible agentic models
actionable: Filter Ollama library for models with 'tools' label before deployment to ensure function calling support for Swarm
source_title: Ollama + OpenAI's Swarm - EASILY Run AI Agents Locally

claim: Performance gap between open-source (Qwen 7B) and GPT-4o is narrowing; gap is diminishing rapidly, making local models increasingly viable for production
actionable: Evaluate local open-source models for workloads where cost and privacy matter more than absolute performance ceiling
source_title: Ollama + OpenAI's Swarm - EASILY Run AI Agents Locally
